data.content: Shipment review approved. Merge commit a5084cb61ef9 and impl commit cc3a142350bd verified on main. make sanity passes (95.16% coverage). Implementation correctly resolves rollback targets from profile state ordering: non-review action states roll back 1 to preceding ready state, review states roll back 3 past the review loop. Queue/terminal/deferred states properly rejected. --dry-run is side-effect free. CLI alias rb works. Both unit tests (rollback.rs) and integration tests (cli_rollback.rs) provide thorough coverage. No regressions detected.
